relationship_to_restored_text: Interpretive contemplative layer aligned by verse. This does not replace the source-audited restored translation.

verses.mystical_translation: Seven final signs appear as wrath moves toward completion.
Those conquering beast-allegiance stand on glass sea with Divine harps.
They sing Moses and Lamb: great and true are your ways.
All nations are summoned to worship the Holy One.
Seven messengers come forth clothed in brightness.
Temple fills with glory-smoke until the signs are complete.

contemplative_note: Revelation 15 is Exodus worship in apocalypse: those who refuse the beast sing Moses and Lamb while nations are called toward manifested justice.
